creator: dominic_marks@btinternet.com
text:

> CET 2001     thierry.herbelot@multi:
> /files3/recup4/obj/usr/src/sys/multi  i386
>
> >Description:
>
> the web page for objprelink has moved to :
> http://leon.bottou.com/objprelink/
> the code is at : http://leon.bottou.com/objprelink/objprelink.c.gz
>
> >How-To-Repeat:
>
> cd /usr/ports/devel/objprelink/
> make fetch
>
> >Fix:
>
> change the download site

This was changed a little while ago:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/devel/objprelink/Makefile

CVSup your ports and enjoy. Thanks for the information though, 
someone else just got there first :)

This PR can be closed.

> >Release-Note:

Dominic
